description: HTTPie provides command-line and desktop tools for testing, debugging, and interacting with HTTP APIs and web services. Its CLI is a human-friendly HTTP client used to send arbitrary HTTP requests from the terminal.
summary: HTTPie exposes a public CLI surface: the HTTPie command-line client (`http`/`https`) with public installation and usage docs; no HTTP API, GraphQL API, or MCP server on httpie.org was found.
